programme.title: Visfot
programme.desc: Two worlds collide in Mumbai: a struggling slum family and a wealthy high-rise resident. When their paths cross, their lives are changed forever. Kookie Gulati.

programme.title: Mannat
programme.desc: Drama Mannat, a gifted chef, works under a boss who is unknowingly her biological mother, and as her dreams for the future collide with the hidden truths of her past, fate begins to reorder her life. Mukta Dhond.

programme.title: Mannat
programme.desc: Drama Mannat, a gifted chef, works under a boss who is unknowingly her biological mother, and as her dreams for the future collide with the hidden truths of her past, fate begins to reorder her life. Mukta Dhond.

programme.title: Jhanak
programme.desc: Determined to fulfill her mother's dream of a better life, a young woman faces numerous trials and personal loss, only to have her journey further complicated by a man she meets along the way. Hiba Nawab, Krushal Ahuja.

programme.title: My Captive
programme.desc: A beautiful yet complicated love blossoms between a spontaneous young man and a girl of strong values and pure intentions. As emotions intensify, their relationship becomes entangled in betrayal, desire, and heartbreak. Hania Aamir, Bilal Abbas Khan.

programme.title: Melodies Of The Heart
programme.desc: A determined mother refuses to bow to the rigid expectations and barriers imposed by society, choosing instead to carve out a path where her daughter's dreams can take flight.

programme.title: Main Aurr Mrs Khanna
programme.desc: Samir and Raina's marriage gets ruined when Samir loses his job. When Samir travels to Singapore searching for wealth to gain back their life together, he returns with a good fortune but to find that Raina is about to marry another man. Will samir lose his beloved Riana or will fate have its words? Kareena Kapoor, Sohail Khan, Prem Soni, Prem Soni, Salman Khan, Preity G Zinta, Bappi Lahiri.

programme.title: Visfot
programme.desc: Two worlds collide in Mumbai: a struggling slum family and a wealthy high-rise resident. When their paths cross, their lives are changed forever. Kookie Gulati.

programme.title: Jhanak
programme.desc: Determined to fulfill her mother's dream of a better life, a young woman faces numerous trials and personal loss, only to have her journey further complicated by a man she meets along the way. Hiba Nawab, Krushal Ahuja.

programme.title: Jhanak
programme.desc: Determined to fulfill her mother's dream of a better life, a young woman faces numerous trials and personal loss, only to have her journey further complicated by a man she meets along the way. Hiba Nawab, Krushal Ahuja.

programme.title: Jhanak
programme.desc: Determined to fulfill her mother's dream of a better life, a young woman faces numerous trials and personal loss, only to have her journey further complicated by a man she meets along the way. Hiba Nawab, Krushal Ahuja.

programme.title: Jhanak
programme.desc: Determined to fulfill her mother's dream of a better life, a young woman faces numerous trials and personal loss, only to have her journey further complicated by a man she meets along the way. Hiba Nawab, Krushal Ahuja.

programme.title: Jhanak
programme.desc: Determined to fulfill her mother's dream of a better life, a young woman faces numerous trials and personal loss, only to have her journey further complicated by a man she meets along the way. Hiba Nawab, Krushal Ahuja.

programme.title: Jhanak
programme.desc: Determined to fulfill her mother's dream of a better life, a young woman faces numerous trials and personal loss, only to have her journey further complicated by a man she meets along the way. Hiba Nawab, Krushal Ahuja.

programme.title: Hum Saath Saath Hain
programme.desc: A family that was always tied together and believed to be a title for family integration comes to separation when their daughter and son in law decide to move to another house leaving a wide gap behind them Alok Nath, Reema Lagoo, Mohnish Bahl, Salman Khan, Saif Ali Khan, Sooraj R. Barjatya, Sooraj R. Barjatya.

programme.title: Visfot
programme.desc: Two worlds collide in Mumbai: a struggling slum family and a wealthy high-rise resident. When their paths cross, their lives are changed forever. Kookie Gulati.

programme.title: The Devil
programme.desc: When everything goes perfect, something should come up and mess it. Guru planned to marry Aisha, but she was killed by a serial killer. Guru decided to avenge his lover. Sidharth Malhotra, Shraddha Kapoor, Riteish Deshmukh, Shaad Randhawa, Aamna Sharif, Mohit Suri, Tushar Hiranandani, Milap Zaveri.

programme.title: Ghudchadi
programme.desc: When Chirag and Devika fall in love and decide to get married, they face an unforeseen obstacle: Chirag's father and Devika's mother were lovers for a long time, which threatens their plans. Binoy Gandhi.

programme.title: Afwaah
programme.desc: An odd chain of events and a coincidental encounter turn the lives of an advertising executive and a rising female politician into fodder for gossip and speculation. Bhumi Pednekar, Nawazuddin Siddiqui, Sharib Hashmi, Sumit Kaul, Sumeet Vyas, Sudhir Mishra, Apurva Dhar Badgaiyan, Shiva Shankar Bajpai.

programme.title: Afwaah
programme.desc: An odd chain of events and a coincidental encounter turn the lives of an advertising executive and a rising female politician into fodder for gossip and speculation. Bhumi Pednekar, Nawazuddin Siddiqui, Sharib Hashmi, Sumit Kaul, Sumeet Vyas, Sudhir Mishra, Apurva Dhar Badgaiyan, Shiva Shankar Bajpai.

programme.title: Mannat
programme.desc: Drama Mannat, a gifted chef, works under a boss who is unknowingly her biological mother, and as her dreams for the future collide with the hidden truths of her past, fate begins to reorder her life. Mukta Dhond.

programme.title: Mannat
programme.desc: Drama Mannat, a gifted chef, works under a boss who is unknowingly her biological mother, and as her dreams for the future collide with the hidden truths of her past, fate begins to reorder her life. Mukta Dhond.

programme.desc: Drama Mannat, a gifted chef, works under a boss who is unknowingly her biological mother, and as her dreams for the future collide with the hidden truths of her past, fate begins to reorder her life. Mukta Dhond.

programme.title: Mannat
programme.desc: Drama Mannat, a gifted chef, works under a boss who is unknowingly her biological mother, and as her dreams for the future collide with the hidden truths of her past, fate begins to reorder her life. Mukta Dhond.

programme.title: Hum Saath Saath Hain
programme.desc: A family that was always tied together and believed to be a title for family integration comes to separation when their daughter and son in law decide to move to another house leaving a wide gap behind them Alok Nath, Reema Lagoo, Mohnish Bahl, Salman Khan, Saif Ali Khan, Sooraj R. Barjatya, Sooraj R. Barjatya.

programme.title: Love By Force
programme.desc: Naitik and Akshara are forced to marry, while love brings Kartik and Naira together, revealing the difference between love-based relationships and forced marriage. Hina Khan, Karan Mehra.

programme.title: Love By Force
programme.desc: Naitik and Akshara are forced to marry, while love brings Kartik and Naira together, revealing the difference between love-based relationships and forced marriage. Hina Khan, Karan Mehra.

programme.desc: Naitik and Akshara are forced to marry, while love brings Kartik and Naira together, revealing the difference between love-based relationships and forced marriage. Hina Khan, Karan Mehra.

programme.desc: Naitik and Akshara are forced to marry, while love brings Kartik and Naira together, revealing the difference between love-based relationships and forced marriage. Hina Khan, Karan Mehra.

programme.desc: Naitik and Akshara are forced to marry, while love brings Kartik and Naira together, revealing the difference between love-based relationships and forced marriage. Hina Khan, Karan Mehra.

programme.title: Melodies Of The Heart
programme.desc: A determined mother refuses to bow to the rigid expectations and barriers imposed by society, choosing instead to carve out a path where her daughter's dreams can take flight.

programme.title: The Devil
programme.desc: When everything goes perfect, something should come up and mess it. Guru planned to marry Aisha, but she was killed by a serial killer. Guru decided to avenge his lover. Sidharth Malhotra, Shraddha Kapoor, Riteish Deshmukh, Shaad Randhawa, Aamna Sharif, Mohit Suri, Tushar Hiranandani, Milap Zaveri.

programme.title: Ghudchadi
programme.desc: When Chirag and Devika fall in love and decide to get married, they face an unforeseen obstacle: Chirag's father and Devika's mother were lovers for a long time, which threatens their plans. Binoy Gandhi.

programme.title: One Man Is Enough
programme.desc: Advocate P.C. Solanki takes on the case of a minor who accuses a renowned spiritual leader of rape. Undeterred by threats, he remains steadfast in his pursuit of justice at any cost. Manoj Bajpayee, Adrija Sinha, Priyanka Setia, Vipin Sharma, Ajoy Chakraborty, Apoorv Singh Karki, Deepak Kingrani.
